title: Venezuelan Shrimp Ceviche
description: A refreshing Venezuelan dish made with succulent shrimp marinated in a zesty mixture of fresh lime juice and spices.
instructions: Rinse shrimp under cold water and pat dry with paper towels.
Cut the mixed onions and aji amarillo pepper into small pieces.
In a large bowl, combine the shrimp, onions, and aji amarillo pepper.
Pour the fresh lime juice over the shrimp mixture and stir to combine.
Add the ceviche seasoning and salt to the shrimp mixture and stir to combine.
Drizzle the xtra-virgin olive oil over the shrimp mixture and stir to combine.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
